ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "governor_party" TEXT /* Political party of the current governor */,
  "last_election_winner" TEXT /* Name of the last election winner in the state */,
  "last_election_winner_party" TEXT /* Political party of the last election winner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the result belongs to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election year */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the state */,
  "r_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the Republican candidate */,
  "d_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the Democratic candidate */,
  "other_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by other candidates */,
  "r_actual" INTEGER /* Actual number of votes received by the Republican candidate */,
  "d_actual" INTEGER /* Actual number of votes received by the Democratic candidate */,
  "other_actual" INTEGER /* Actual number of votes received by other candidates */,
  "i_actual" INTEGER /* Actual number of votes received by independent candidates */,
  "ev_r" INTEGER /* Electoral votes won by the Republican candidate */,
  "ev_d" INTEGER /* Electoral votes won by the Democratic candidate */,
  "ev_i" INTEGER /* Electoral votes won by independent candidates */,
  "rd_diff" REAL /* Difference in percentage between Republican and Democratic votes */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code representing the political leaning of the state */,
  "color_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the color */,
  "last_color" TEXT /* Color code from the previous election */,
  "shift" REAL /* Shift in the color ranking from the previous election */,
  "has_runoff" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether a runoff election was held */,
  "runoff_date" TEXT /* Date of the runoff election */,
  "runoff_r_actual" INTEGER /* Actual number of votes received by the Republican candidate in the runoff */,
  "runoff_d_actual" INTEGER /* Actual number of votes received by the Democratic candidate in the runoff */,
  "runoff_i_actual" INTEGER /* Actual number of votes received by independent candidates in the runoff */,
  "runoff_ev_r" INTEGER /* Electoral votes won by the Republican candidate in the runoff */,
  "runoff_ev_d" INTEGER /* Electoral votes won by the Democratic candidate in the runoff */,
  "runoff_ev_i" INTEGER /* Electoral votes won by independent candidates in the runoff */,
  "turnout_rate" REAL /* Turnout rate of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "candidate_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the candidate */,
  "candidate_url" TEXT /* URL to the candidate's official website */,
  "candidate_social_media" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the candidate's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party FOREIGN KEY ("party") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election result the vote belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate the vote is for */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "vote_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES election_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electoral_votes" (
  "ev_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electoral vote entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election result the electoral vote belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate the electoral vote is for */,
  "electoral_votes" INTEGER /* Number of electoral votes won by the candidate */,
  "ev_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of electoral votes won by the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electoral_votes_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES election_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electoral_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election result accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the election result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES election_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "party_logo" TEXT /* URL to the party's logo */,
  "party_url" TEXT /* URL to the party's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election year */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the election */,
  "is_presidential" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the election year is a presidential election year */,
  "is_midterm" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the election year is a midterm election year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_party_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state party affiliation */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election year */,
  "affiliation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the state's party affiliation */,
  "affiliation_source" TEXT /* Source of the affiliation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_party_affiliations_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_party_affiliations_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_party_affiliations_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_election_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state election data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election year */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the state */,
  "turnout_rate" REAL /* Turnout rate of the state */,
  "swing_state" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the state is a swing state */,
  "voter_registration_rate" REAL /* Rate of voter registration in the state */,
  "voter_registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for voter registration */,
  "early_voting_start" TEXT /* Start date of early voting (if applicable) */,
  "early_voting_end" TEXT /* End date of early voting (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_election_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_election_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election prediction */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election year */,
  "predicted_r_votes" INTEGER /* Predicted number of votes for the Republican candidate */,
  "predicted_d_votes" INTEGER /* Predicted number of votes for the Democratic candidate */,
  "predicted_i_votes" INTEGER /* Predicted number of votes for independent candidates */,
  "predicted_r_percentage" REAL /* Predicted percentage of votes for the Republican candidate */,
  "predicted_d_percentage" REAL /* Predicted percentage of votes for the Democratic candidate */,
  "predicted_i_percentage" REAL /* Predicted percentage of votes for independent candidates */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_predictions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_predictions_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("year_id")
)
